creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Got me ... I can't test on CURRENT (see comments) so assumed it was a CURRENT issue but no affect on 7.x

If you have a better idea that will fix this on 7 and CURRENT let me know.

> From: Wesley Shields <wxs@FreeBSD.org>
> To: peter.thoenen@yahoo.com
> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Sent: Friday, June 19, 2009 4:50:30 PM
> Subject: Re: ports/135624: [PATCH] ports/security/tor-devel
> 
> Why is the ACLOCAL_ARGS change here? Is it necessary? It seems very out
> of place...
> 
> -- WXS
